rationale: The UI toggle fix is present, but the new Playwright coverage is incorrect: it stalls every `AxonUiEffectivePolicy` GraphQL request, including the page-load policy fetch, so the collection view never loads and `policy-enforcement.spec.ts` cannot reliably pass.

findings.summary: The mock blocks all `AxonUiEffectivePolicy` requests before `page.goto()`, which also catches the initial collection-page policy fetch from `loadCollection()`. That deadlocks the page before any entity row is clickable, so the acceptance test does not correctly verify the double-click race and `policy-enforcement.spec.ts` will hang/fail instead of continuing to pass.
